prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约8906→7914→6294→6094→5762名，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争逐年加剧），近5年累计前移约3144名；2025年基准位次约5762名，较2024年前移约332名，上升势头明显；该校在贵州省招生计划：2021年32人、2022年30人、2023年31人、2024年33人、2025年40人；2026年计划大幅扩招至77人，较2025年增加37人，增幅达92.5%，为历年最大扩招幅度，供给端显著增加。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升（2021年第50名→2026年第43名），稳居全国前50强，属于中上水平211高校，办学实力和认可度稳步提升；该校在2021–2026年声誉监测中均未被收录，无重大负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第27位（较热），2023年曾进入高热榜第6位，短视频平台曝光度较高，反映报考关注度处于中等偏上水平；未见投档线断档或异常记录；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程获评A级，为该校王牌学科；船舶与海洋工程、核科学与技术、水声工程等特色学科实力突出，与招生专业中的自动化类、海洋工程类、核工程与核技术等高度关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气/自动化等工科大类社会热度持续偏热至高热推荐，与该校优势学科方向吻合；贵州省2026年高考总人数约29.9万，估算物理类考生约20.8万，与2025年（20.7万）基本持平，竞争基数未明显变化；2026年；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，属东北地区，距贵州较远；近年该校在贵州招生占比约1.0%–1.9%，非主要生源省份，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性偏弱。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强势走势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招92.5%带来的竞争宽松效应、学校排名稳步上升及抖音热度较热带来的吸引力增强，以及考生总数基本持平的中性影响，在2025年基准5762名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次将显著后移（位次数字增大，竞争相对减弱）。预测最低位次约8760名，位次区间8260–9260名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（兴海领军班）
- 材料科学与工程（兴海领军班）
- 核工程与核技术
- 核化工与核燃料工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（含水声工程、电子信息工程、通信工程等）
- 自动化类（含自动化、机器人工程、计算机科学与技术等）
- 软件工程
- 计算机科学与技术（兴海领军班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 海洋工程类（含船舶与海洋工程、海洋机器人等）
- 能源动力类（含能源与动力工程、轮机工程）
- 航空航天类（含飞行器设计与工程、飞行器动力工程等）
- 大数据管理与应用
- 新能源材料与器件。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次区间8260–9260名，建议位次在区间内的考生以二档专业（电子信息类、自动化类、软件工程）为主攻方向，一档专业（人工智能兴海领军班、核工程类）作为冲刺，三档专业（海洋工程类、能源动力类、航空航天类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<8260名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>9260名）建议以三档专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 8906 → 7914 → 6294 → 6094 → 5762, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, intensifying competition year by year), with a cumulative advance of about 3144 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5762, advancing about 332 positions compared to 2024, with a clear upward momentum; the university's enrollment plan in Guizhou Province: 32 students in 2021, 30 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 33 in 2024, 40 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 77 students, an increase of 37 students compared to 2025, a growth rate of 92.5%, the largest expansion in history, with a notable increase in supply.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Rankings have been rising in recent years (from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026), firmly in the top 50 nationally, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities, with steadily improving school strength and recognition; the university was not included in reputation monitoring from 2021 to 2026, with no major negative public opinion incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 27th (relatively hot), once entered the hot list at 6th place in 2023, with relatively high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting a moderate to high level of application attention; no records of admission cutoff line breaks or anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A-level, the university's flagship discipline; Ship and Ocean Engineering, Nuclear Science and Technology, Underwater Acoustic Engineering, and other characteristic disciplines are outstanding, highly related to the enrollment majors such as Automation, Ocean Engineering, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering categories such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical/Automation continue to be hot to highly recommended socially, aligning with the university's advantageous disciplines; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 299,000, with an estimated 208,000 physics category candidates, basically unchanged from 2025 (207,000), with no significant change in the competition base; 2026; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region, far from Guizhou; in recent years, the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.0%–1.9%, not a major source province, with neutral to weak regional preference impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the strong trend of continuous advancement in historical rankings, the competitive easing effect of a 92.5% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan, the steady rise in university rankings and increased attractiveness due to Douyin popularity, and the neutral impact of a basically unchanged total number of candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 5762, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to significantly move backward (ranking number increases, competition relatively weakens). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8760, with a ranking range of 8260–9260.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (Xinghai Leading Class)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Xinghai Leading Class)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology
- Nuclear Chemical Engineering and Nuclear Fuel Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (including Underwater Acoustic Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.)
- Automation (including Automation, Robotics Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, etc.)
- Software Engineering
- Computer Science and Technology (Xinghai Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Ocean Engineering (including Ship and Ocean Engineering, Ocean Robotics, etc.)
- Energy and Power (including Energy and Power Engineering, Marine Engineering)
- Aerospace (including Aircraft Design and Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, etc.)
- Big Data Management and Application
- New Energy Materials and Devices.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking range is 8260–9260. It is recommended that candidates within this range focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Automation, Software Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Artificial Intelligence Xinghai Leading Class, Nuclear Engineering) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Ocean Engineering, Energy and Power, Aerospace) as a safe backup. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<8260) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (>9260) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors.
